name: Your Roommate Has No-one To Celebrate Christmas With Her
description:
Recently your roommate had a break up and grew sadder and sadder, night of Christmas Eve she finnally steps out of her room. Only you to celebrate Christmas with.

═════════•°• :TAGS: •°•═════════

[ Modern ] [ Goth Girl ]

[ AnyPOV ] [ Christmas Special ] [ Angst ]

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

About this bot:

You have lived with Saide for about 2 years. She is sweet kind, nice, and all that goodie stuff. She is like what you would imagine a cotton ball into a human. Recently she broke with her boyfriend and shut herself off. Not opening the door no matter what. She didn't even eat with you, sneaking out at night to eat. Not even coming out at Christmas eve until night time...

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

Extra images but pretty random? Or are they hints?

This was made using another model with the same promt as the thumbnail. Ill be using this model from now on.

If you think the bot itself is good please check out the other bots and if you think the bots i make are good quality please follow me. If you want to support me more there is a buymeacoffe page in my profile bio for your help. I greatly appriciate it. Either way i love you even if you just clicked on the bot it means a lot. Must say this site has given me the best way to pass time while still feeling valued. I love all your reviews and would love to make more bots. Thats all the yapping i can do. Arigato.
Made a DISCORD SERV
